examples: Alan doesn't care two hoots about politics.
His confession was greeted with derisive hoots.
The suggestion was greeted by hoots of laughter.
Strains of 'Bread of Heaven', and hoots of derision for an over-sized TV cameraman, soon echoed the venue.
Analysts greeted the deal with hoots, catcalls and downgrades on Friday, and this morning brought a rousing encore of more of the same.
